text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I came up with a lot of proverbs today, so I'd
better write them down in my notebook before I
forget any!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I sure have a lot of Chiyonotes now, though.
Maybe I should separate the proverbs out into
their own section.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, this brings back memories. "You'll only
sell yourself short if you sell yourself to
shortcuts."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"You only have three minutes on the turf." "Set
the table at breakneck speed." Ahh, I'd almost
forgotten these. My early proverbs are so
spirited.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Hoard all the crispy rice crackers you can"... This
one could use some work.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I rework it with my current expertise, I'd write it
as... "When it comes to rice crackers, it's crunch or
be crunched!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This might be more work than I anticipated...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But that proverb turned out so much better,
maybe I should try reworking some of my other
ones too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Sakura Chiyono O loses herself in
her notebook, forgetting the time and missing
training completely.
